blog_title: T-Shirt Stitching Quality Check for Bulk Orders — How ₹12 Thread Ruined 500 Pieces
caption:
500 pieces ruined. ₹40k wasted. One reason: a ₹12 thread.

Cheap polyester thread shrinks differently than cotton after washing. Seams split. We learned this the hard way when a customer's batch fell apart after one wash.

Good stitching uses ₹40-50 cotton-wrapped thread + proper stitch density. Pull any seam hard before you order bulk — that's your quality check.

Save this post if you're sourcing your next batch 👇
